Item Name: Five Cheese Flavored Pita Thins - Crispy & Flaky Chips Made From Real Pita Bread - 6.75 oz (Pack of 2)
Bullet Point 1: Made from Real Pita Bread: Enjoy Pita Thins Five Cheese crisps made from authentic pita bread, with vegetables baked into the dough and dusted with a mouthwatering blend of cheeses for irresistible flavor.
Bullet Point 2: Perfect Snack or Meal Pairing: These light, crispy pita thins are ideal for snacking, pairing with dips, or serving alongside salads.
Bullet Point 3: Wholesome Ingredients: Made with no artificial flavors or colors, Pita Thins offer a delicious, natural snack option packed with flavor, making them perfect for health-conscious snack lovers.
Bullet Point 4: Light & Satisfying Crunch: Baked to perfection, these pita crisps have a light texture and bold cheesy flavor, with low saturated fat, so you can enjoy a savory snack without compromising your healthy lifestyle.
Bullet Point 5: Pack of 2: Each order includes two 6.75 oz bags, making it easy to stock up on these flavorful pita crisps. Perfect for sharing, packing in lunches, or keeping on hand for a quick, satisfying snack.

Each crisp is dusted with a mouthwatering blend of cheeses, creating the perfect balance of crunch and cheesy goodness in every bite. These versatile pita thins are ideal for pairing with your favorite dips, enjoying on their own, or serving alongside a fresh salad for a satisfying, light lunch. Whether as a snack or a meal complement, Pita Thins Five Cheese crisps offer a unique, savory indulgence you’ll love.

Light texture and low saturated fat position it as a healthier snack option.

Bullet Point 1: HIYO PEACH MANGO SOCIAL TONIC: A functional seltzer that encourages you to enjoy the moment. Sweet peach twists with smooth mango to create a tropical tango so delightful, you can almost feel the trade winds blow. 12 fl oz. / 12 pack
Bullet Point 2: FEEL THE FLOAT: “The float” is a calm and uplifting sensation that comes from 1.7 grams of adaptogens, nootropics, and botanicals packed into every can of Hiyo. Crafted with ashwagandha, l-theanine, lion’s mane, lemon balm, passion flower, and ginger.
Bullet Point 3: HAPPY IN YOUR OWN: It’s our hope that enjoying Hiyo inspires more solace on the sofa, more happy hours without hangovers, more presence at parties, and ultimately, a happier, healthier you.
Bullet Point 4: GUILT-FREE INDULGENCE: Each can of Hiyo is just 30 calories with 4-5 grams of sugar and 0% ABV. Available in 4 craveable, fruit-forward flavors.
Bullet Point 5: ABOUT HIYO: We’re on a mission to change the way the world drinks by creating a movement to unwind in a healthier way. Whether you’re cutting back for the night, weekend, month, or for good, raise a can and find out what it means to be happy in your own.
